title: Economic Statement Implementation Act, 2020
description: Economic Statement Implementation Act, 2020 (Economic Statement Implementation Act...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Economic Statement Implementation Act, 2020 .

provisions.chapter: 1992, c. 48, Sch. Related Amendment to the Children’s Special Allowances Act

provisions.title: October 2, 2020
provisions.content: 11 Section 9 is deemed to have come into force on October 2, 2020.

provisions.title: Payment — requisition of Minister of Economic Development and Official Languages
provisions.content: 12 (1) There may be paid out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2021, on the requisition of the Minister of Economic Development and Official Languages, a sum not exceeding $206,700,000 to the regional development agencies for the Regional Relief and Recovery Fund. (2) For the purpose of subsection (1), regional development agencies means (a) the Department of Western Economic Diversification; (b) the Atlantic Canada Opportunities Agency; (c) the Canadian Northern Economic Development Agency; (d) the Economic Development Agency of Canada for the Regions of Quebec; (e) the Federal Economic Development Agency for Southern Ontario; and (f) the Federal Economic Development Initiative for Northern Ontario.

provisions.title: Payments — requisition of Minister of Health
provisions.content: 13 (1) Subject to subsection (2), there may be paid out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2021, on the requisition of the Minister of Health, all money required to do anything in relation to the initiatives specified in the schedule. (2) The total of all payments made under subsection (1), in respect of an initiative specified in column 1 of the schedule, must not exceed the limit specified for that initiative in column 2 of the schedule.

provisions.title: Payment — requisition of Minister of Employment and Social Development
provisions.content: 14 (1) There may be paid out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund until March 31, 2021, on the requisition of the Minister of Employment and Social Development, a sum not exceeding $500,000,000 for the purpose of making income support payments under section 4 of the Canada Emergency Response Benefit Act . (2) For greater certainty, the payments that may be made out of the Consolidated Revenue Fund under subsection (1) must not include the costs of administering or enforcing the Canada Emergency Response Benefit Act .

provisions.chapter: R.S., c. F-11 Related Amendment to the Financial Administration Act
provisions.title: For greater certainty
SCHEDULE
provisions.content: SCHEDULE (Section 13) Payment Limits Item Column 1 Column 2 Initiatives Limits ($ millions) (cash basis) 1 Mental health and substance use in the context of COVID-19 64.4 2 Investments in long-term care 505.7 3 Supporting innovative approaches to COVID-19 testing 45 4 Virtual care and mental health tools for Canadians 68.6 5 Medical research, countermeasures, vaccine funding and development, border and travel measures and isolation sites 217.6
